description: High-level, review-safe request for generating QA candidates from local sources.

request_id.description: Optional caller identity; changing it intentionally creates a new request.
request_id.title: Request Id

workspace_id.description: Optional managed workspace ID; omit to derive a deterministic safe ID.
workspace_id.title: Workspace Id

goal.description: QA analysis goal. Generated output remains an unapproved candidate.
goal.title: Goal

source_paths.description: Absolute UTF-8 text file or directory paths under server allow-source-root values.
source_paths.title: Source Paths

expected_artifacts.description: Artifact types to generate; defaults to testcases.
expected_artifacts.title: Expected Artifacts

quality_policies.description: Registered quality policy names; arbitrary Python imports are forbidden.
quality_policies.title: Quality Policies

title: AgentRequest
